releaseNotes: Many fixes and features. If the Download button isn't working here, please right-click the Download button and copy the link to paste URL in your browser. Thank you!
changelog: BCL: added Snapshot option per preset for virtual mode - hardware still requires a manual press of EDIT + < to send snapshots
BCL: added Lock option per preset — prevents accidental edits on the hardware
BCL: added the option to send one or more controls to hardware without having to send entire preset
BCL: added Resolution field per encoder — controls MIDI steps per physical detent for coarse/fine tuning
BCL: fixed Program Change bank select (MSB/LSB) values being lost when re-importing BCL from hardware
Buttons: added Increment Mode selector — choose step value or number of steps (divided by 128)
Buttons: added Bank Select MSB and LSB fields for Program Change (standard and increment modes)
Buttons: fixed Increment mode generating incorrect BCL (now emits 'InC' instead of 'toFF')
Buttons: fixed Program Change not available as an Increment type
Virtual Mode: incoming MIDI now updates mapped controls in real time
Virtual Mode: MIDI feedback loop detection with modal warning and auto-disable
Virtual Mode: echo suppression prevents self-echoes on shared IAC buses
Virtual Mode: fixed button Momentary (press/release) sending extra messages
Virtual Mode: fixed button Increment mode sending wrong values
Virtual Mode: same-port warning toast when input and output share the same IAC bus
MIDI: added None option to input and output port selectors
MIDI: added MIDI reconnect button for recovering dropped IAC connections
MIDI: filtered MIDI clock and system real-time messages to reduce noise
MIDI: limited incoming MIDI visual update rate to ~30fps to prevent UI freezes
MIDI Monitor: auto-filters to show both directions in Virtual Mode
Custom Output: added .tx directive support for encoder, button, and fader SysEx output
Presets: prompt to save unsaved changes when navigating to a different preset or bank
Presets: fixed standalone preset loading while a bank is active
Presets: fixed default preset and banks to be the same as default Behringer files
Controller: removed browser context menus on controls
Controller: fixed knob rotation staying in sync with LED ring at extremes
Controller: fixed Preset Globals bug
CC increment defaults: switching a button to increment mode now defaults offValue to 127 and onValue to 0, matching the value order the hardware expects to step through the range correctly

Send/Receive port management: input port is automatically disconnected during Send to Hardware and reconnected immediately after, preventing SysEx echo and port conflicts. Output port is automatically disconnected during Receive from Hardware and reconnected after the session ends

Receive from Hardware reliability: each listening session now forces a fresh disconnect/reconnect of the input port before registering the handler, eliminating stale midir connections that previously required a manual port reset
Window opens maximized on launch
Added shortcuts for Virtual Mode toggle (cmd+shift+v), Receive from Hardware toggle (cmd+shift+V), Send to Hardware (cmd+Shift+S), and Receive from Hardware (cmd+Shift+R), and Preferences (cmd+,)
